body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape with thickened, corded muscle definition along the jawline and brow ridge, while the pointed ears gain a bristly, short-fur texture in burnt sienna. The teal body transforms into deep rust with charcoal gray scar tissue patterns resembling cracked earth across the skin, and the leaf patterns become rugged, textured ridges of ochre. The flower-like structure on top evolves into a dense cluster of knuckle pads with hardened skin, and the curled spiral tail tip gains a rough, calloused texture with crimson accents. Small additive details include faint scar lines tracing the limb joints and a subtle bristly fur texture on the limbs.
signature_feature: Flower structure: hardened knuckle pads with cracked earth scar tissue and crimson callus ridges.
